prestazioni: Engine: 4.6L Modular V8 (engine code: **Windsor 2V or 4V, depending on year; e.g., 4.6L 2V SOHC for 1996-1998, 4.6L 4V DOHC for 1999-2004**) – Full forged internals with **Manley Performance forged crankshaft (4.6L-specific, 3.543" stroke)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods (6.125" length)**, and **JE Pistons forged slugs (9.5:1 compression for forced induction, 4032-T6 alloy)**. Paired with **ARP head studs (200,000 PSI tensile strength)** and **Cometic MLS head gaskets (0.051" thickness)** for boost readiness up to 15 PSI.

Forced Induction: **Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA turbocharger (Journal Bearing, 62mm inducer, 66mm exducer)** with **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV (adjustable dual-port)**. Custom **stainless steel turbo manifold (equal-length, 1.75" primaries, 3" collector)** by **Stainless Works**, paired with **Vibrant Performance 3" V-band downpipe** and **custom 3.5" exhaust system with Burns Stainless merge collectors**. Intercooled via **Garrett GT-series air-to-water intercooler (12" x 24" core, 3.5" end tanks)** with **Moroso 10-gallon ice reservoir** for track use.

Fuel & Ignition: **Fuel system upgrade with dual **AEM 340 LPH in-tank fuel pumps** (for E85 compatibility), **Injector Dynamics ID1000cc injectors (flow-matched, 1000cc/min at 43.5 PSI)**, and **Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator (dual-spring, adjustable base pressure)**. Ignition handled by **MSD Digital 6AL-2 programmable ignition box** with **MSD Blaster SS coil** and **NGK TR6IX-11 iridium spark plugs (0.030" gap for forced induction)**. ECU reflash via **Livernois Motorsports custom tune (SCT X4 handheld, speed-density calibration for 4.6L 4V DOHC)** with **Innovate Motorsports LC-2 wideband O2 sensor** for real-time AFR monitoring.
estetica: Body Kit: **Rocket Bunny V1 SN95-specific widebody kit (Pandem Designs, 3-piece front bumper, bolt-on fender flares, and carbon fiber duckbill spoiler)** with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (2080 series, satin finish)**. Front lip and side skirts reinforced with **carbon fiber weave (2x2 twill, 3K finish)** for weight reduction.

Wheels & Suspension: **Forgeline GA3R 18x9.5" (front) and 18x11" (rear) wheels (ET25 offset, 5x114.3 bolt pattern)** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear)**. Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable, 24-click rebound, 12-click compression)** and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)**. Chassis stiffening via **Maximum Motorsports subframe connectors (bolt-in, mild steel)** and **polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension full kit, 95A durometer)**.

Interior & Aero: **Recaro SRD full bucket seats (SN95-specific mounts, FIA-approved 8-point harnesses)** with **Sparco 6-point camlock harnesses (3" width, HANS-compatible)**. Custom **carbon fiber dashboard overlay (1mm thick, 2x2 twill)** and **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip)**. Aero enhancements include **Vortex Generators (3M 4011, 1.5" height) on the roof** and **custom aluminum diffuser (3-piece, 3" diffuser tunnels)** by **Aeroflow Dynamics** for rear downforce.
